title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock to v0.8.8

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/gvisor-tap-vsock (github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock)</summary>

### [`v0.8.8`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/releases/tag/v0.8.8)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/compare/v0.8.7...v0.8.8)

#### What's Changed

- Enable config file based configuration by [@​MrEcco](https://redirect.github.com/MrEcco) in [#​484](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/484)
- feat: add notification mechanism for network lifecycle events by [@​vyasgun](https://redirect.github.com/vyasgun) in [#​566](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/566)
- Fix broken DNS lookups  for responses with long TXT records or multiple TXT records by [@​fessyfoo](https://redirect.github.com/fessyfoo) in [#​561](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/561)
- Implement client.ListDHCPLeases() and add REST API documentation by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [#​557](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/557)
- Remove use of go-version-file in github actions, and document how to update the gvisor go module by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [#​589](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/589)
- Replace VFKT handshake with MSG\_PEEK for vfkit connection identification by [@​vyasgun](https://redirect.github.com/vyasgun) in [#​530](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/530)
- Add make cross-lint target for cross-platform linting  by [@​vyasgun](https://redirect.github.com/vyasgun) in [#​538](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/538)
- Misc code cleanups by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [#​551](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/551), [#​552](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/552), [#​555](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/555),  and [#​602](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/602)
- tests: Rename SSH keys files by [@​evidolob](https://redirect.github.com/evidolob) in [#​565](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/565)

##### Dependencies Updates

- build(deps): bump actions/checkout from 5 to 6 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​575](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/575)
- build(deps): bump actions/setup-go from 5 to 6 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​544](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/544)
- build(deps): bump actions/upload-artifact from 4 to 6 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​564](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/564) and [#​586](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/586)
- build(deps): bump github.com/coreos/stream-metadata-go from 0.4.9 to 0.4.10 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​553](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/553)
- build(deps): bump github.com/foxcpp/go-mockdns from 1.1.0 to 1.2.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​588](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/588)
- build(deps): bump github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/v2 from 2.3.1 to 2.8.0 in /tools by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​537](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/537), [#​556](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/556), [#​567](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/567), [#​573](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/573), [#​578](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/578), and [#​590](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/590)
- build(deps): bump github.com/miekg/dns from 1.1.68 to 1.1.72 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​585](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/585), [#​593](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/593), and [#​601](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/601)
- build(deps): bump github.com/onsi/gomega from 1.38.0 to 1.39.1 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​541](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/541), [#​583](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/583), [#​592](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/592), and [#​603](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/603)
- build(deps): bump github.com/sirupsen/logrus from 1.9.3 to 1.9.4 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​598](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/598)
- build(deps): bump github.com/stretchr/testify from 1.10.0 to 1.11.1 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​542](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/542)
- build(deps): bump golang.org/x/crypto from 0.41.0 to 0.47.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​549](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/549), [#​558](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/558), [#​574](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/574), [#​579](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/579), and [#​595](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/595)
- build(deps): bump golang.org/x/mod from 0.27.0 to 0.32.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​548](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/548), [#​560](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/560), [#​571](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/571), [#​581](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/581), and [#​594](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/594)
- build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.39.0 to 0.40.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​591](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/591)
